properties.entry: SELECT Field.* FROM Field JOIN ( SELECT MAX(Field.modifiedDate) AS maxModifiedDate, Field.name, Field.ownerId FROM Field WHERE Field.context = :context AND Field.ownerId = :ownerId GROUP BY Field.ownerId, Field.name ) MaxModifiedDateField ON Field.modifiedDate = MaxModifiedDateField.maxModifiedDate AND Field.name = MaxModifiedDateField.name AND Field.ownerId = MaxModifiedDateField.ownerId
SELECT Field.* FROM Field WHERE Field.fieldType = :fieldType AND Field.ownerType = :ownerType AND Field.value IN (:values)
